meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome can't finish projects. A Beginner-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Antigravity Project Template for SaaS MVP Success
content.seo_description: Stop stalling your SaaS. Use the Antigravity project template and Claude Code to launch your MVP fast. A founder-focused, step-by-step technical checklist.
content.answer_block: The 'can't finish' syndrome stems from architectural paralysis and scope creep. The Antigravity project template provides a hardened, production-ready foundation, while Claude Code automates the tedious boilerplate. By constraining your stack and automating implementation, you force your MVP to a launch-ready state in days, not months.
content.intro:
The graveyard of SaaS is filled with half-finished prototypes and abandoned GitHub repositories. You start with a vision of a unicorn, but you suffocate under the weight of authentication flows, database migrations, and endless dependency hell. The dream dies not because the idea was bad, but because the execution lacked a repeatable engine.

Enter the Antigravity project template. This is the industrial-grade scaffolding designed to bypass the 'blank page' anxiety that kills most founder projects. By pairing this structure with the raw intelligence of Claude Code, you transform from a frustrated coder into an orchestrator of high-velocity software production.

steps.title: Bootstrap the Antigravity Scaffold
steps.description: Initialize your project using the core template to ensure you have a pre-configured, production-ready environment that handles base security and CI/CD out of the box.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new project using the Antigravity SaaS boilerplate with Stripe integration and Supabase auth.

steps.title: Define the MVP Schema
steps.description: Translate your core business logic into a database schema that supports your primary monetization model before writing any UI code.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a database schema for a subscription-based SaaS with tables for users, plans, and usage logs.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'apply schema changes to supabase/migrations'

steps.title: Automate Feature Implementation
steps.description: Use Claude Code to map your business requirements directly to the Antigravity component library, maintaining consistent design patterns.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Build a dashboard component that displays real-time user usage metrics using the Antigravity UI kit.

steps.title: Integrate Stripe Billing
steps.description: Connect your application to Stripe using the pre-built hooks in the template to ensure you can capture revenue on day one.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure Stripe webhooks to handle subscription upgrades and cancellations.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'connect stripe-billing module to user-settings'

steps.title: Deploy to Production
steps.description: Perform a final audit of the codebase to prune unused dependencies and push to your hosting provider via the template's native pipeline.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Audit the project for production readiness and generate the deployment config file.

pro_tips: Never hand-code authentication; always use the template's pre-configured Auth provider to prevent security vulnerabilities.
Force yourself to launch with only one core feature; the Antigravity template allows for easy modular growth later.
Treat Claude Code as a junior developer: review every single file change it proposes to maintain architectural integrity.
Use the 'antigravity-watch' mode during development to auto-sync your local changes with your cloud staging environment.
Focus on the 'Happy Path' for your first 10 users; ignore complex edge cases until you have your first dollar of revenue.
content.next_steps: Once your MVP is deployed, immediately set up a feedback loop with your first 5 users and prioritize your roadmap based on actual usage metrics rather than your initial assumptions.
content.conversion_block: Stop building in isolation. Join the elite group of founders who ship consistently using our proven architectural patterns and AI-first workflows. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
